reference: Hello, my five-month-old has a little bruise on the right side of her rib cage. I have noticed a hard lump underneath it, and it is hot. She doesn't look sick, and there are no other symptoms. I am sure she hasn't been traumatized. What could it possibly be? Should I take her to a pediatrician?
text: Hello, my five-month-old has a little bruise on the right side of her rib cage. I have noticed a hard lump underneath it and it is hot. She doesn't look sick and there are no other symptoms. I am sure she hasn't been traumatized. What could it possibly be? Should I take her to a pediatrician?
